name: @terminull/plugin-api
description: Terminull plugin contract: manifest types + zod schemas for the 8 contribution points, the pluginApi semver gate, a programmatic plugin-directory validator, and a scaffolding generator.
//: PUBLIC package (M10). The plugin manifest source of truth moved here from @terminull/shared so plugin authors can depend on it without the private monorepo. `.` is pure (zod only — safe in the web bundle via shared's re-export); `./validate` uses node:fs and must never be imported from shared/web.
